completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for ML sidecar health isolation. No implementation edits performed.
Reviewed spec.md/design.md/scopes.md against the planned implementation. Confirmed FR-050-001/002/003/005 each map 1:1 to a planned adversarial regression test. No scope drift introduced.

Added 3 SST keys (ML_EMBEDDING_WORKERS, ML_EMBEDDING_QUEUE_MAX, ML_HEALTH_LATENCY_SLA_MS) to config/smackerel.yaml + scripts/commands/config.sh. Rewrote ml/app/embedder.py with dedicated bounded ThreadPoolExecutor isolating embedding work from the FastAPI async loop. Extended _check_required_config startup validation in ml/app/main.py. Added Gauge/Counter metrics in ml/app/metrics.py: smackerel_ml_embedding_workers_configured, smackerel_ml_embedding_inflight, smackerel_ml_embedding_rejected_total.

Added 8 adversarial regression tests in tests/test_main.py and 6 adversarial regression tests in tests/test_embedder.py covering FR-050-001/002/003/005. Updated tests/test_startup_warning.py to set new SST keys.
Full ml python suite: 436 passed / 1 skipped. Go contract tests (internal/deploy, internal/config, internal/api) all green — specs 042/045/046 invariants preserved.

Chaos-probed via three adversarial regression scenarios: (1) executor saturation under sustained encode pressure — median /health latency stayed within ML_HEALTH_LATENCY_SLA_MS=500ms; (2) backpressure rejection at queue_max with rejected counter increment proof; (3) malformed config (missing/non-int/non-positive/queue_max<workers) — 13 parametrized fail-loud assertions.

FR-050-001 (health responsive under embedding saturation), FR-050-002 (bounded executor admission control), FR-050-003 (SLA budget configurable + observable), FR-050-005 (metrics published) all proven by adversarial regression tests.
Artifact lint, ruff, black, go vet, go build all clean on touched files.
Added ML Sidecar Health Isolation section to docs/Operations.md cross-referencing spec 050.
